rows.description: Computus Dni Rectoris S. L. Richards 2d die Novbr AD 1819 ad eundem diem resolution Bunt
rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as the most accurate. Corrected 'Norbn' to 'Novbr' based on visual inspection of the image. All extractors correctly identified this as a header with no monetary amounts.

Consensus on row type and no amounts. `gemini-flash` and `gpt-5-mini` correctly transcribed 'Arrearagia Recepta'. Visual inspection confirms the spelling. Clearly a section header, underlined in the image.
Full consensus across all extractors for description, type, and empty amounts. Clearly a sub-section header.

Selected `gemini-flash`'s transcription. Visual inspection confirms 'Guinear Rectory 1 yr' and that the '60' is clearly aligned in the pounds column. `claude-haiku` incorrectly placed the amount in the shillings column.

Selected `gemini-flash`'s transcription. Visual inspection confirms the description 'Kidlington Do ½ yr' and that the '10' is clearly aligned in the pounds column. `claude-haiku` incorrectly placed the amount in the shillings column.
Consensus on monetary amounts (1, 7, 6). Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate, with a slight correction of 'Branch' to 'Brach' based on close visual inspection of the handwriting.
Consensus on monetary amounts (9, 6, 8). Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate. Clear visual reading.

Consensus on monetary amounts (6, 13, 4). Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate. Visual inspection confirms the pounds digit '6' and the description 'Widow' despite notes from other extractors indicating ambiguity.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s transcription. Visual inspection confirms the description 'Pickford 1 yr' and the amounts (£1, 13s, 4d). `claude-haiku` misread the shillings as '19' instead of '13'.

Selected `gemini-flash`'s transcription. Visual inspection confirms the description 'Fredesham 1 yr' and the amounts (£6, 13s, 4d). `gpt-5-mini` misread pounds as '16' and pence as '9' with a fraction. `claude-haiku` misread pounds as '26'. The '6' for pounds is consistent with the style in row 8.

rows.description: Little Tew Colman late Ducks 1 yr
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts (1, 6, 1). Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate. Visual inspection confirms the faint '1' pence and the word 'Ducks'.

Selected `gemini-flash`'s transcription. Visual inspection confirms the description 'Lymarth 3 yr' and the amounts (no pounds, 17s, 6d). `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly placed '17' in the pounds column and missed pence. `claude-haiku` misread shillings as '7'.

Selected `gemini-flash`'s transcription as the most accurate. Visual inspection confirms the description 'Buckley Tenements 1 yr' and the presence of a long dash indicating no monetary amounts. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly described the row as 'crossed out'.
Consensus on row type and empty amounts. `gemini-flash` and `gpt-5-mini` correctly transcribed 'Redeemed Land Tax'. Clearly a section header.
Consensus on monetary amounts (11, 2, 9). `gemini-flash` and `gpt-5-mini` accurately transcribed the description including '½ yr' / '1/2 yr'. Visual confirmation.
Consensus on monetary amounts (£28, no shillings/pence). Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate ('Wickham'). Visual confirmation.
Consensus on monetary amounts (£14, no shillings/pence). Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate ('Yarnton'). Visual confirmation.
Full consensus across all extractors for description, type, and empty amounts. Clearly a sub-section header.
Consensus on monetary amounts (91, 2, 6). Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate ('Augmentation 1 yr'). Visual confirmation.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s transcription. Visual inspection confirms description 'Long Withenham Rectory 1 yr' and all amounts (£102, 7s, 5d). `claude-haiku` incorrectly left the pence empty.

Consensus on shillings, pence, and fraction. Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate, and confirmed pounds as '171' (which `claude-haiku` misread as '11'). Visual confirmation of all amounts and the '½' fraction.
Consensus on monetary amounts (7, 10, 2). Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate ('3 yrs'). Visual confirmation.

rows.description: Norton Rectory 1 yr Ad. Tax deducted
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts (238, 15, 10). Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate ('Norton Rectory 1 yr Ad. Tax deducted'). Visual confirmation.
Consensus on monetary amounts (44, 9, 4). Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as most accurate ('Yarnton Rectory 1 yr'). Visual confirmation.

Selected `gemini-flash`'s transcription. Visual inspection confirms all amounts (£806, 17s, 1d, 0.5f). The pence is clearly '1'. No description text is present on the page for this total row; `gpt-5-mini` misread the pence as '0' and `claude-haiku` as '11'.
